# tfe_project_policy_set_exclusion

Provides a resource which manages the exclusion of a project from a policy set.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `policy_set_id` (String) The ID of the policy set that will have an exclusion for the project
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project that will be excluded from the policy set

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the project exclusion. This is a synthetic ID in the format <policy_set_id>_<project_id>.
